app.name: EdTech Platform
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyDescription: Course updates and grading alerts will appear here.
progress.title: Progress
progress.subtitle: Completion, enrollments, and certificates from your learning activity.
progress.certificatesDescription: Shareable proof issued when you complete every lesson in a course.
progress.noCertificatesDescription: Complete every lesson in a course to issue your first certificate.
progress.yourCoursesDescription: Jump back into learning or review completion state.
progress.noEnrollmentsDescription: Open Explore to browse published courses and enroll. This page then tracks your enrollments and progress.
certificateVerify.title: Certificate verification
certificateVerify.subtitle: Verify whether this certificate was issued by this platform.
certificateVerify.notFoundDescription: This code is invalid or certificate was revoked.
certificateVerify.validDescription: This certificate is active and matches platform records.
audit.title: Audit logs
audit.subtitle: Review admin and course lifecycle actions across the platform.
audit.searchPlaceholder: Search actor, action, entity, or ID
audit.noLogsDescription: Admin updates and course lifecycle changes will appear here.
jobs.title: Job queues
jobs.subtitle: Monitor background processing for grading, analytics, and platform automation.
jobs.noFailedJobs: No failed jobs in this queue.
jobs.noWaitingJobs: No waiting jobs in this queue.
jobs.noQueuesDescription: Configured background queues will appear here after the monitor connects.
users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Provision accounts, update roles, and review identities synced with your auth provider.
users.createDescription: Manual onboarding for external auth user IDs.
users.directoryDescription: Workspace members visible to your session.
users.detailSubtitle: Review identity, permissions, and activity for one account.
users.identityDescription: Core profile data synced from auth and role controls managed by admins.
users.roleChangeDescription: Changing role updates what this user can see and manage after their next app refresh.
users.statusChangeDescription: Suspended users cannot use protected backend APIs until reactivated.
users.activityDescription: Latest audit entries related to this user ID.
users.noActivityDescription: Role, status, and admin actions related to this user will appear here.
users.noUsersDescription: Create a user or clear filters to populate this directory.
explore.title: Explore courses
explore.subtitle: Browse published courses, preview details, and enroll when you are ready.
explore.heroDescription: Search the catalog, open any course to preview, then enroll in one click when you are signed in.
explore.guestHint: Use Sign in in the sidebar to enroll. You can browse and preview courses anytime.
explore.emptyNoMatchDescription: Try a different search term or clear the filter.
explore.emptyNoCoursesDescription: When instructors publish courses, they will appear here.
courseDetail.title: Course
courseDetail.subtitle: Manage lessons, learners, and publication state from one workspace.
courseDetail.archiveConfirm: Archive this course? Learners can no longer enroll; existing enrollments stay for history.
courseDetail.publishRequirementsDescript: Complete these before learners can see this course.
courseDetail.publishRequirementsMissing: Complete all publish requirements before publishing.
courseDetail.lockReasonPlaceholder: Describe why this course is invalid or inappropriate
courseDetail.lockConfirm: Lock this course? It will be hidden from learners and enrollment will stop.
courseDetail.unlockConfirm: Unlock this course and restore its previous status?
courseDetail.courseLockedBanner: This course is locked for moderation.
courseDetail.courseLockedReadOnly: Course is locked. Only admins can edit until it is unlocked.
courseDetail.moderationDescription: Lock invalid courses to block enrollment and learner access.
courseDetail.adminReviewModeDescription: You can view this course and lock or unlock it. Only the instructor can edit course content.
courseDetail.adminSelectExamDescription: Select an exam from the list to review its settings and questions.
courseDetail.adminReadOnlyHint: Read-only review. Use lock/unlock in Settings to moderate this course.
courseDetail.adminExamQuestionsDescripti: Question bank for the selected exam (correct answers highlighted).
courseDetail.adminSelectAssignmentDescri: Select an assignment from the list to review its instructions and settings.
courseDetail.examsDescription: Course assessments learners will take after studying.
courseDetail.noExamsDescription: Create an exam draft when the course is ready for assessment.
courseDetail.addExamDescription: Define exam metadata now. Questions and attempts will be added in the next flow.
courseDetail.examDescriptionPlaceholder: What this exam checks and when learners should take it...
courseDetail.archiveExamConfirm: Archive this exam? Learners will no longer see it.
courseDetail.examAttemptDescription: Answer all questions, then submit when ready.
courseDetail.examSubmittedDescription: Your submission is saved. Grading will appear when available.
courseDetail.examGradedDescription: Your score is ready. Review the result below.
courseDetail.examAwaitingManualGrade: Waiting for instructor grading on free-text questions.
courseDetail.selectLessonDescription: Choose a lesson from the curriculum to start learning.
courseDetail.examAutoSubmitted: Time is up. Exam submitted automatically.
courseDetail.examAttemptsDescription: Review submitted exams, inspect answers, and save final scores.
courseDetail.noExamAttemptsDescription: Submitted learner attempts will appear here.
courseDetail.noAttemptAnswers: No saved answers for this attempt.
courseDetail.examQuestionsDescription: Write and maintain the question bank for the selected exam.
courseDetail.noExamSelectedDescription: Choose an exam from the list before adding questions.
courseDetail.noQuestionsDescription: Add the first question for this exam.
courseDetail.questionFormDescription: Use stable option IDs such as A, B, C so answers stay readable.
courseDetail.questionPromptPlaceholder: Write the question learners will answer...
courseDetail.questionOptionsHint: One option per line. Prefix with A. or B. when needed.
courseDetail.questionOptionsPlaceholder:
A. First option
B. Second option
C. Third option
courseDetail.deleteQuestionConfirm: Delete this question? This is allowed before exam attempts exist.
courseDetail.assignmentsDescription: Course tasks learners submit for instructor review.
courseDetail.noAssignmentsDescription: Create a published assignment when learners need to submit work.
courseDetail.addAssignmentDescription: Set instructions, due date, scoring, and optional reference material.
courseDetail.assignmentTitlePlaceholder: Build and submit a small project
courseDetail.assignmentInstructionsPlace: Explain what learners must submit and how it will be evaluated...
courseDetail.uploadAssignmentFileDescrip: Drop a PDF, markdown, document, or ZIP file here, or paste a hosted link below.
courseDetail.assignmentFilePreviewDescri: Review the assignment attachment before saving.
courseDetail.archiveAssignmentConfirm: Archive this assignment? Learners will no longer see it.
courseDetail.submitAssignmentDescription: Write your answer or attach a file link before submitting.
courseDetail.assignmentSubmissionPlaceho: Describe your work, repo link, notes, or answer...
courseDetail.uploadSubmissionFileDescrip: Drop a PDF, markdown, document, or ZIP file here, or paste a hosted link below.
courseDetail.submissionFilePreviewDescri: Review the file learners or instructors will open.
courseDetail.assignmentLateWarning: The due date has passed. You can still submit, but this submission will be marked late.
courseDetail.assignmentSubmittedLate: This submission was sent after the due date.
courseDetail.assignmentSubmissionsDescri: Review learner work and save scores with feedback.
courseDetail.feedbackPlaceholder: Add concise feedback for the learner...
courseDetail.noReviewsDescription: Reviews appear after enrolled learners rate the course.
courseDetail.commentPlaceholder: Share what helped, what was missing, or who this course suits...
courseDetail.overviewDescription: What learners see before and after enrollment.
courseDetail.addLessonDescription: Choose a lesson type, add content, then place it at the end of the curriculum.
courseDetail.lessonTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Getting started with the toolchain
courseDetail.documentPlaceholder: Write the lesson body learners will read...
courseDetail.editorLoadFailed: Could not load the editor. Refresh this page and try again.
courseDetail.documentTypeHint: Write rich text with headings, lists, and links.
courseDetail.videoTypeHint: Upload a video file or paste a hosted video URL.
courseDetail.resourceTypeHint: Attach a PDF, notes, or reference file for learners.
courseDetail.uploadResourceDescription: Drop a PDF, notes, or markdown file here, or choose a file from your device.
courseDetail.uploadVideoDescription: Drop an MP4, WebM, or MOV video here, or choose a file from your device.
courseDetail.resourcePreviewDescription: Review the uploaded file or pasted link before saving.
courseDetail.videoPreviewDescription: Play the uploaded video or hosted URL before saving.
courseDetail.previewUnavailable: This file type cannot be embedded here. Open it in a new tab to review.
courseDetail.previewLoadFailed: Could not load this preview. Open the file in a new tab to review.
courseDetail.curriculumDescription: Learner-facing lesson order. Drag items to reorder; changes save silently.
courseDetail.noLessonsDescription: Create the first lesson. It will appear in this table.
courseDetail.lessonsLockedSignInDescript: Sign in and enroll to open the curriculum for this course.
courseDetail.lessonsLockedEnrollDescript: Enroll in this course to unlock the lesson list and track progress.
courseDetail.enrolledLearnersDescription: Search and scan learners without stretching the page.
myLearning.dropEnrollmentConfirmDescript: You will lose quick access until you enroll again. Your lesson progress stays saved.
courseDetail.noEnrollmentsDescription: Publish the course so students can enroll.
courseDetail.courseCertificatesDescripti: Review issued certificates and revoke or restore verification access.
courseDetail.noCourseCertificatesDescrip: Certificates issue automatically after learners complete every lesson.
courseDetail.courseSettingsDescription: Edit metadata, cover image, and lifecycle state.
courseDetail.coverEmptyDescription: Upload a 16:9 image. It will be cropped and optimized for course cards.
courseDetail.courseRequirementsPlacehold: What learners should know before starting...
courseDetail.courseOutcomesPlaceholder: What learners will be able to do after finishing...
courseDetail.deleteLessonConfirm: Delete this lesson? Progress for this lesson will be removed.
courseStudio.title: Course studio
courseStudio.subtitle: Create courses, prepare materials, and move drafts into the published catalog.
courseStudio.adminSubtitle: Review instructor courses, inspect lifecycle status, and manage published catalog quality.
courseStudio.adminModeDescription: You can inspect and manage every course. Course creation stays with instructors.
courseStudio.instructorModeDescription: Only your courses appear here. Build drafts, lessons, exams, and publish when ready.
courseStudio.createDescription: Work through each setup step. Progress is saved when you continue.
courseStudio.detailsIncomplete: Complete required course details before continuing
courseStudio.examsStepListDescription: Select an exam to edit metadata or add questions.
courseStudio.examsStepFormDescription: Exams are optional. Add questions after creating or selecting an exam.
courseStudio.examQuestionsAfterSave: Save this step first, or create the exam while the course is saved, then add questions.
courseStudio.examsStepEmpty: No exams yet. Skip this step or add one on the right.
courseStudio.assignmentsStepListDescript: Select an assignment to edit instructions, scoring, and due date.
courseStudio.assignmentsStepFormDescript: Assignments are optional. Add due dates and scoring when ready.
courseStudio.assignmentsStepEmpty: No assignments yet. Skip this step or add one on the right.
courseStudio.reviewStepDescription: Confirm everything looks right, then save or publish the course.
courseStudio.reviewChecklistDescription: Required items must be complete before creation.
courseStudio.browseOnlyDescription: Your role can browse published courses.
courseStudio.needInstructorAccess: Ask an admin for instructor access to create and manage courses.
courseStudio.coverEmptyDescription: Upload a 16:9 image with the course name visible. It will be optimized before saving.
courseStudio.courseDescriptionPlaceholde: What learners will build and practice...
courseStudio.courseRequirementsPlacehold: What learners should know before starting...
courseStudio.courseOutcomesPlaceholder: What learners will be able to do after finishing...
courseStudio.createHint: All fields below are required. Add lessons in the Curriculum tab, then save once.
courseStudio.lessonsRequired: Add at least one lesson in the Curriculum tab before creating the course.
courseStudio.restoreFailed: Could not reload this draft course.
courseStudio.saveCourseFirst: Add lessons here before creating the course.
courseStudio.addFirstLessonHint: Add at least one lesson. It is saved when you continue.
courseStudio.addLessonsDescription: Build the first lessons for this course without leaving the creation flow.
courseStudio.manageDescription: Manage drafts, media, lessons, and publication state.
courseStudio.noCoursesCreate: Create a draft from the form. Course rows appear here for editing and publishing.
courseStudio.noCoursesManage: Courses created by instructors will appear here for review and management.
courseStudio.noCoursesBrowse: No published courses are available yet.
validation.lessonTitleMin: Use at least 3 characters for the lesson title
validation.courseTitleMin: Use at least 3 characters for the course title
validation.courseDescriptionMin: Use at least 10 characters for the course description
validation.courseDescriptionMax: Course description must be 1000 characters or fewer
validation.courseMetadataMax: This field must be 100 characters or fewer
validation.courseDurationMin: Duration must be at least 1 minute
validation.courseLongTextMax: This field must be 2000 characters or fewer
validation.courseCoverUrlMax: Cover image URL is too long
validation.examTitleMin: Use at least 3 characters for the exam title
validation.examTitleMax: Exam title must be 200 characters or fewer
validation.examDescriptionMax: Exam description must be 1000 characters or fewer
validation.examDurationMin: Duration must be at least 1 minute
validation.examQuestionPromptMin: Use at least 3 characters for the question prompt
validation.examQuestionPromptMax: Question prompt must be 2000 characters or fewer
validation.examQuestionOptionsMin: Choice questions need at least two options
validation.examQuestionOptionsMax: Options must be 4000 characters or fewer
validation.examQuestionAnswersRequired: Add at least one correct answer
validation.examQuestionAnswersMax: Correct answer list is too long
validation.examQuestionExplanationMax: Explanation must be 2000 characters or fewer
validation.examQuestionPointsMin: Question points must be at least 1
validation.assignmentTitleMin: Use at least 3 characters for the assignment title
validation.assignmentTitleMax: Assignment title must be 200 characters or fewer
validation.assignmentInstructionsMax: Instructions must be 5000 characters or fewer
validation.assignmentMaxScoreMin: Max score must be at least 1
validation.assignmentSubmissionContentMa: Submission content must be 10000 characters or fewer
validation.assignmentSubmissionRequired: Add submission content or an attachment link
validation.assignmentFeedbackMax: Feedback must be 5000 characters or fewer
errors.network: Unable to reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.http.401: Your session has expired. Sign in again.
errors.http.403: You do not have permission to do this.
errors.http.404: The requested item was not found.
errors.http.409: This action could not be completed because of a conflict.
errors.http.422: Some fields are invalid. Check your input and try again.
errors.http.500: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.
errors.api.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to do this.
errors.api.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Sign in again.
errors.api.INVALID_TOKEN: Your session is invalid. Sign in again.
errors.api.VALIDATION_ERROR: Some fields are invalid. Check your input and try again.
errors.api.COURSE_NOT_PUBLISHED: This course is not open for enrollment.
errors.api.COURSE_ENROLLMENT_REQUIRED: Enroll in this course to access this content.
errors.api.USER_EMAIL_EXISTS: This email is already in use.
errors.api.LAST_ADMIN_REQUIRED: At least one admin account must remain.
